metadata.notes: Sweden 2026, employee under 66. Municipal (kommun + region) income tax on income after grundavdrag; state tax 20% above the skiktgräns of 643,000 SEK (taxable income). Grundavdrag and jobbskatteavdrag computed per Skatteverket SKV 433 (prisbasbelopp 59,200). The 7% allmän pensionsavgift is fully offset by a matching tax reduction and is not shown. Employer social contributions are not deducted from the employee. Church fee (kyrkoavgift) applies to members only; burial fee is excluded. Estimate.
